violations.text: Inspector observed restroom with a missing proper handwashing sign. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -fan blades located in the meat walk-in cooler, -cooler vents in the deli open case, -retail shelves in the retail area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
Inspector observed ceiling tiles in the retail area with old water stains. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces observed with debris: 1.fans in the meat cooler and vents in cheese display case observed with dust. 2.food storage shelves in retail area have debris. 2 New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
The receptacle in the restrooms is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Outside dumpster area observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, food debris, and/or other debris. Refuse area hall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

The floors in walk in freezers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
